subject: Build User Profile Page
description:
Trust dashboard - reputation is visible, measurable, and human.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md, then design/frontend/src/components/showcase/ShowcasePage.jsx (profile-preview section, lines ~530-633) for layout patterns.

Work:
- Identity header: large avatar, name, role label, verified badge, bio
- Stats row: followers, successful campaigns, trust score (0-100)
- Trust composition panel (dark gradient bg): fulfillment rate, update consistency, repeat donor confidence - each with progress bar and percentage
- Campaign history grid (3 columns on lg): past campaigns with title, year, amount raised, backer count, short note
- Link campaign cards back to /campaign/:id routes
- Responsive: works at 375px and 1440px
- data-testid on all interactive elements

Explore: the trust panel is the signature element. Consider how to make trust feel earned and credible, not just decorative.

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Profile page component structure
- How trust score display connects to the formula in fixtures
- Any shared components created or modified

changes: Rewrote app/src/pages/ProfilePage.jsx - identity header with trust composition panel, verification step indicator, campaign history grid (active + past), lifetime totals strip
Updated CLAUDE.md with Profile Page structure docs
learnings: Trust panel gradient uses from-primary via-primary to-[hsl(195,69%,27%)] matching the sky-blue chart color for visual depth
Verification steps render as a stepped pill indicator with connecting lines - greyed out steps for unverified tiers make it clear what's missing
loose_ends: Past campaign cards are text-only (no images) since past campaigns in fixtures don't have full story data, just summaries
